name: Maryland Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound String beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except crabmeat in a large pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil and cover.
3. Simmer for about 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Add crabmeat to the soup and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
